[Home](https://www.enventure.com/) Our Services

# Our Services

Is optimization of resources a major concern for your engineering team?

Does every strategy implementation take up a huge amount of time, money and effort?

We deliver best in-class Plant Engineering, Electronic Product Design, Mechanical Product Design, Building Engineering, Environmental Compliance, MRO Solutions, Asset Management, Component Engineering and related services to clients across the globe. If your projects are moving slower than the speed of current technology and competition, we are here to assist you.

At Enventure, we are focused on quality, irrespective of the size, scale or sector of our projects. Our team of experts, with a combined experience of over 1000 man years are dedicated to finding the best solutions for our clients that are efficient and reliable.

## The engineering offerings from Enventure are focused on four areas to support clients’ needs across industries

### Plant Engineering

Enventure presents comprehensive Plant Design Engineering Services that include design, analysis and procurement solutions.

Process, Piping, Mechanical, Civil & Structural, Electrical & Instrumentation, Procurement Engineering

[Read More about Plant Engineering](https://enventure.com/services/plant-engineering/)

![Plant Engineering](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/banner-plant1.jpg)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/mechanical.jpg)

### Product Engineering

Enventure is a full service mechanical product design firm offering Concept Design, Engineering Analysis, Technical Documentation & Support services.

Concept Design, Engineering Analysis, Detail Engineering, Technical Documentation, Support Services

[Read More about Product Engineering](https://enventure.com/services/mechanical-product-design)

### Building Engineering

Building Engineering services by Enventure offers superior quality solutions to clients including MEP, Architecture, Interior design and Structural Design

BIM Modeling, MEP Services, Architectural Design, Structural, 3D Laser Scanning

[Read More about Building Engineering](https://enventure.com/services/building-engineering/)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/building-engineering-services.png)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/MRO-solutions.png)

### MRO Solutions

Take control of MRO spend analytics, enhance procurement capabilities, optimize costs with our MRO solutions.”

Data Cleansing, Data Classification, MRO Data Governance, MRO Cost Reduction, Sourcing and Procurement Support

[Read More about MRO Solutions](https://enventure.com/services/mro-solutions)

### Compliance Solutions

Enventure is a pioneer in engineering and environmental compliance services with a global customer base.

RoHS, REACH, Conflict Minerals, IMDS, Consulting Services, PPAP Support

[Read More about Compliance Solutions](https://www.compliancexl.com/?utm_source=website&utm_medium=services&utm_campaign=enventure)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/banner-env-comp1.jpg)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/06/component-engineering.jpg)

### Component Engineering

Enventure offers an array of Component Engineering Services across industries such as Hi-tech Electronics, Industrial Automation, Telecom and Medical.

Obsolescence Management, Item Master Consolidation, BOM cost Reduction

[Read More about Component Engineering](https://enventure.com/services/component-engineering)

### Asset Management

Effectively optimize asset performance, increase asset uptime and reduce maintenance costs with the help of Asset management services by Enventure.

Equipment/Asset BOM, Asset Register, Plant Walkdown, ERP \| EAM \| CMMS Support, Connected Maintenance, Reliability Services

[Read More about Asset Management](https://enventure.com/services/asset-management)

![](https://enventure.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/asset-management-services.png)

[+1 (312) 755 3971](tel:+13127553971)
